titleStmt.title: SII 10.164: original edition by J. Ramayya Pantulu
No. 164. (A.R. No. 108 of 1917.) ON A NĀGA SLAB SET UP NEAR THE VILLAGE OF MAṆḌAPĀḌU, GUNTUR TALUK, SAME DISTRICT. About Ś. 1090.

summary.p: States that one Mandaḍi Nāmi-Nāyaka, his brothers and other relations made gifts of land to the temple of Mallikārjuna at Mandāvuram in the Koṇḍapaḍumaṭi country and also to the pūjāris for the merit of Rājēndra-Chōḍa-Mahārāja, son of Kulōttuṅga-Chōḍa Goṅka.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti samastaprasastisahitaṁbuna śrīmanmahāmaṁḍalēśvara kulōttuṁgga
cōḍagoṁkamahārājula priyātmajuṁ ḍaina rājēṁdracōḍamahārāju
naku dharmmārtthamugāṁ goṁḍapaḍumaṭilōni maṁddāvuramu śrī
mallikhārjjunamahādēvaraku maṁddaḍi nāmināyakuṁḍḍunu ta
mmuṁḍu prōlināyakuṁḍunu vīri tammulunu vīri maṟaṁ
dulunuṁ goḍukulunu Allurunu vīri putrānupautrikamugā dīpa
nivēdyabhōgamunaku sūryyatapōdhaniki gaḍḍugamaḍi kha 2 nivēdyamuna
ku kha 2 saṁkumalleku kha 1 mruggunu mrēkaku prōlamaku na 10 Īceṟvu dē
varadivināyakuniki kha 1 dēvataku paṭṭelumāreku na 10 prōlināyaku ceṟvu
na nīrinēla na 2 nārāyanuceṟvuna nīrinēla na 2 karaṇaṁ māraya ceṟvuna nīrinēla
na 2 prōliraḍḍi malliraḍḍi kētiraḍḍi Eṟamaraḍḍi kommiraḍḍi pottaceṟvuna nīrinēla na 1 bra
hmapuri prōlamu brammadēvabhaṭlaku kha 2 nāmanabhaṭlaku kha 2 dōnebhaṭlaku kha 2 komma nabhaṭlaku kha
2 mārayabhaṭlaku kha 2 . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā Ō harēta vasuṁdharāṁ ṣaṣṭi rvarṣasaha
[srāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ .]
Digital edition of SII 10.164 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
